title: Extra Large Unicorn Birthday Plastic Gift Bag 56"×36" Jumbo Present Wrap Sack with Pastel Rainbow for Girls Kids' Birthday Party Oversized Presents Decoration(1 Pack)
features: [Unicorn Birthday Gift Bag] Large 56×36 inch unicorn birthday gift bag includes 1 pcs large plastic gift bag, 1 pcs gift tag and 1 pcs pink string. 56×36 inch unicorn birthday gift bag easily fits toddler bike, kid clothing, quilts, giant stuffed animals, and bulky toys, no more struggling with small bags! You can cut off the excess parts and cut them to any size you want!

[Reusable & Durable Gift Bag] The unicorn birthday gift bag is made of thick, tear-resistant plastic, our bag won’t rip like paper or cheap foil bags, holds books, toys, and small appliances without breaking. Thanks to its plastic material, the bag is waterproof, ensuring your gifts stay dry and safe until they’re opened—avoid accidental spills! Unlike single-use wrapping paper, this bag can be stored and reused, reducing holiday waste!

[No Wrapping Stress] The attached string reduces packaging pressure, just drop in your gift, pull the strings, and done! No tape, scissors, or messy wrapping paper. No complicated wrapping required to make your presents look beautiful! Saves time during the birthday rush, great for last-minute gifts or people who want to wrap their own presents!

[Magical Unicorn Design] Perfect for unicorn-obsessed people! This bag is designed with adorable unicorn faces (featuring sparkly metallic horns and soft rose crowns) that’ll make any birthday feel like a magical adventure. The pastel pink ombre background and happy birthday text add a sweet, festive touch—she’ll instantly fall in love with it! Your gift will stand out and bring instant smiles to family and friends alike.

[Wide Applications] Ideal for secret gift exchanges, classroom gifts, or office parties, where you need to wrap multiple gifts quickly and stylishly. Use it for storage (clothes, decorations), birthday parties, wedding favors, or even as a festive shopping bag! Loved by parents, teachers, and party planners.
description: Product Description Big Eye Owl Our big gift bags have cool designs and are made really well, so they'll make your presents look awesome. Whether you need bags for birthdays, weddings, Christmas, or anything else. Big Eye Owl has the perfect gift wrap to make your gifts look the best! SPECIFICATIONS: Material: Plastic Color: Pink Size: 56×36 Inch Shape: Rectangle PACKAGE INCLUDES: 1 pcs 56×36 inch large unicorn birthday gift bag 1 pcs gift tag 1 pcs pink string Unicorn Birthday Gift Bag Each unicorn has a sparkly cone horn, a crown of roses, adding a touch of sweetness. Rainbow arches and fluffy clouds scattered across the bag complete the whimsical scene, while happy birthday text reinforces the festive mood. Measuring 56×36 inches, this spacious bag is ideal for wrapping everything from bulky toys, quilts, and stuffed animals and large holiday surprises. Made from durable, tear-resistant plastic, it ensures strength and longevity, while its waterproof properties keep your gifts safe and dry. Perfect for birthday parties, adult milestones, or even surprise gifts, our Birthday Gift Bag is more than just wrapping—it's a part of the celebration. Make birthday extra magical with our unicorn birthday gift Bag! Designed with her favorite fantasy elements—unicorns, rainbows, clouds, and a sprinkle of gold glitter—this bag will instantly light up her face when she sees it! Combining premium quality with visual appeal, this birthday gift bag delivers both functionality and style. Whether you need to package oversized gifts or enhance your themed celebration, this Gift Bag is your perfect choice!
